gdpr.title: 🇪🇺 My Data (GDPR)
gdpr.description: In accordance with GDPR Article 15, you can download all your personal data.
gdpr.formatInfo: Format: JSON • Includes: profile, agents, documents, conversations, teams

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Visualize your activity and companion usage.
analytics.empty: No activity yet. Start chatting with your companions!

dangerZone.title: ⚠️ Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: These actions are irreversible. Your data will be permanently deleted or anonymized.

anonymize.description: Keeps your data for statistics but removes your personal information

delete.description: Completely deletes your account and all your data (agents, documents, conversations)

anonymize.title: Anonymize account?
anonymize.description: Your account will be anonymized. Your data will be kept for statistics but all your personal information (name, email) will be deleted.

delete.title: Delete account?
delete.description: This action is IRREVERSIBLE. All your data will be permanently deleted: agents, documents, conversations, teams.

company.title: Organization
company.description: Join or create an organization to collaborate and share integrations.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Change your password by entering your current and new password.
changePassword.errorSamePassword: New password must be different from current password
changePassword.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication (TOTP).
twoFactor.newCodesWarning: Your previous backup codes have been invalidated. Save these new codes in a secure location.

alerts.exportSuccess: ✓ Your data has been downloaded successfully
alerts.anonymizeSuccess: ✓ Your account has been anonymized successfully
alerts.deleteSuccess: ✓ Your account has been deleted successfully
